title: mikania hoehnei
intro: Mikania hoehnei is a type of plant, also known as Quinininha or Quininheira, native to the tropical regions of Brazil. It is commonly used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Mikania hoehnei include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating infections, among others. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and ointments.
